subject: [DMaaP MR] Remove "lost+found" in kafka PVC
commit_message:
[DMaaP MR] Remove "lost+found" in kafka PVC

When using a storage class, kafka data is set on top of a partition and
then 'lost+found' ext4 folder, which is automatically created, is seen
as a topic but with bad naming.

So we remove this folder in the init script.

Issue-ID: OOM-1227
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: If04304326fc5478f791d8290b8ceb39753c59c2f

Patch Set 1:

Some storage solutions, esp in cloud create the extraneous folders such as 'lost+found'. It may cause issues for some applications. Not all of them while starting the application. So if we are targeting a cloud deployment without any changes to the charts, it is better to clean those extraneous folder in all places where PV's are used. Are you deleting these extraneous files in all charts
